---
layout: cv
title: Zachary Hunter's CV
---
# Zachary Hunter
Student at BYUI.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mojozach32@gmail.com">mojozach32@gmail.com</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/Mojozach/Mojozach.github.io/blob/main/Zachary%20Hunter.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Education

Brigham Young University      - Idaho  September 2025 - April 2028/ Rexburg, ID
- Sophomore Standing
- Relevant Coursework
- Programming Fundamentals
- Data Structures (planned/in progress)
- Computer Systems

### PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Engineering / Technical Intern

# Astronics
April 2022 - May 2022
Buffalo, NY
- Undertook an Internship for CADD experience with knowledge and experience from Ormsby 
CADD education
- Assisted engineers with technical and documentation tasks development of invention to make 
manufacturing team work more efficient
- Supported project teams with software and system-related work
- Gained exposure to real-world engineering workflows and project development environments

# Ormsby Education Center
Ormsby
September 2020 - June 2022
Buffalo, NY
- Created and modified technical drawings using AutoCAD
- Assisted with drafting and design adjustments for engineering projects
- Maintained organized design documentation and revisions

# MET worker/ full time/ Home Depot
- Trained with a team
- Learned socializing skills
- Helped team with tasks and work loads

# Lot worker / full time/ Home Depot
June 2021 - September 2021
Orchard Park,NY
June 2022 - September 2022
Home Depot
- Learned how the company is run by workers with customers
- Strengthened workers
Orchard Park, NY


### Research interests

none.


## OBJECTIVE

Motivated Computer Science student at Brigham Young University seeking an internship or entry-level 
role where I apply programming, CAD design, and problem-solving skills to real-world technical 
challenges


## PROGRAMMING LANGUAGES

Python
- C#
- HTML
- Technical Tools
- AutoCAD / CAD Design
- Basic Cybersecurity Concepts



## OTHER SKILLS

- Problem Solving
- Team Collaboration
- Technical Communication

### LEADERSHIP & SERVICE

Church Leadership Service
Boy Scouts of America
- Achieved Eagle Scout
- Planned and executed a community service project requiring leadership, logistics, and team 
coordination
- Developed strong leadership, perseverance, and service values
- Held multiple leadership positions in church callings
- Organized group activities and service projects
- Mentored and supported members of youth and community groups

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

Originally from Buffalo
- Interested in software development, cybersecurity, and engineering technology
- Strong work ethic with proven leadership and teamwork experience

<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
